title: Achievements
seoTitle: Game of Darts Achievements | BarkinMad Studios
description: Unlock Game Center achievements by playing matches, exploring different game modes, and improving your darts skills in Game Of Darts.
summary: Game Center achievements reward regular play, exploring different game modes, and improving your performance over time.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts achievements

sections.heading: Unlocking Achievements
paragraphs: Achievements are automatically tracked through Apple Game Center as you play Game Of Darts.
Complete matches, explore different game modes, and continue playing to unlock new achievements and build your collection.

sections.heading: Achievement Progress
paragraphs: Your available achievements and progress are displayed through Game Center.
As new game modes and features are added, additional achievements may become available in future updates.

images.caption: Track your Game Center achievements as you play.

featureShowcases.heading: Earn Achievements as You Play
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements reward regular play and encourage you to explore everything Game Of Darts has to offer.
body: Every completed match helps you progress towards new achievements. Whether you're trying different game modes or simply playing more often, Game Center automatically tracks your progress.
Achievements provide extra goals beyond winning matches, giving you more reasons to keep improving your game.
bullets: Reward regular play across supported game modes.
Work alongside leaderboards and player statistics.

image.caption: Game Center keeps track of your achievements and leaderboard progress.

featureShowcases.heading: Play Naturally, Progress Automatically
featureShowcases.summary: Achievement progress happens in the background while you enjoy your matches.
body: There's nothing extra you need to do. Simply play matches, improve your skills, and Game Center updates your achievement progress automatically.
As your experience grows, you'll unlock new milestones while building your statistics and climbing the leaderboards.
bullets: Progress updates automatically after supported matches.

image.caption: Achievements are earned naturally through regular play.
